ordinanceLabel: Ord. 25-1217 · December 4, 2025 (2025 CBSC adoption, eff. Jan 1, 2026)
fireAgency: LAFD — Los Angeles Fire Department (city-owned — NOT LA County Fire)
climateZoneNote: CZ8 coastal/basin, CZ9 inland valleys (San Fernando Valley). Mountain parcels may be CZ16.
bhoNote: Baseline Hillside Ordinance (LAMC §12.21-A.17) — verify parcel in Hillside Area via ZIMAS
vhfhszNote: ~20% of city — Santa Monica Mtns, Hollywood Hills, Verdugo Mtns, San Rafael Hills
coastalNote: Pacific Palisades, Venice, Playa del Rey, San Pedro
hpozNote: ~35 HPOZs citywide — advisory for ministerial permits
softStoryNote: Ord. 183893 — mandatory retrofit for pre-1978 wood-frame multi-family
faultZoneNote: Santa Monica, Hollywood, Newport-Inglewood, Verdugo Alquist-Priolo zones
aduNote: LADBS Standard Plan Program — 96+ pre-approved ADU designs for faster permitting
suggestedQuestions: Can I build an ADU on my hillside lot in Los Angeles?
What is the Baseline Hillside Ordinance and does it apply to my property?
How do I get an express permit through PermitLA?
Is my property in a fire hazard severity zone?
What is the ADU Standard Plan Program?
Does my building need a soft-story retrofit?
Do I need LAFD plan check approval for my project?
How does LADWP interconnection work for solar?
